title: mimulus linearis
intro: Mimulus linearis, also known as straight-beaked monkey flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe anxiety and stress due to its adaptogenic and nervine effects. The health benefits of Mimulus linearis are thought to be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Mimulus linearis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
